ayahArabic: عَلَىٰ صِرٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: On a straight path.

ayahArabic: عَلَىٰ صِرٰطٍ مُّسْتَقِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: On a straight path.

targetTranslation: the sending down (possessed by العَزِيزِ الرَّحِيمِ - the Mighty, the Merciful)
ayahArabic: تَنزِيلَ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ
ayahEnglish: [This is] a revelation of the Exalted in Might, the Merciful,

targetTranslation: a people (object of لِتُنذِرَ - for you to warn)
ayahArabic: لِتُنذِرَ قَوْمًا مَّآ أُنذِرَ ءَابَآؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غٰفِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: That you may warn a people whose forefathers were not warned, so they are unaware.

ayahArabic: لِتُنذِرَ قَوْمًا مَّآ أُنذِرَ ءَابَآؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غٰفِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: That you may warn a people whose forefathers were not warned, so they are unaware.

ayahArabic: لِتُنذِرَ قَوْمًا مَّآ أُنذِرَ ءَابَآؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غٰفِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: That you may warn a people whose forefathers were not warned, so they are unaware.

targetTranslation: those who are unaware/ignoring (plural, in subject position)
ayahArabic: لِتُنذِرَ قَوْمًا مَّآ أُنذِرَ ءَابَآؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غٰفِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: That you may warn a people whose forefathers were not warned, so they are unaware.

ayahArabic: لَقَدْ حَقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَىٰٓ أَكْثَرِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Already the word [i.e., decree] has come into effect upon most of them, so they do not believe.

ayahArabic: لَقَدْ حَقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَىٰٓ أَكْثَرِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Already the word [i.e., decree] has come into effect upon most of them, so they do not believe.

ayahArabic: لَقَدْ حَقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَىٰٓ أَكْثَرِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: Already the word [i.e., decree] has come into effect upon most of them, so they do not believe.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِىٓ أَعْنٰقِهِمْ أَغْلٰلًا فَهِىَ إِلَى ٱلْأَذْقَانِ فَهُم مُّقْمَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have put shackles on their necks, and they are to their chins, so they are with heads [kept] aloft.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِىٓ أَعْنٰقِهِمْ أَغْلٰلًا فَهِىَ إِلَى ٱلْأَذْقَانِ فَهُم مُّقْمَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have put shackles on their necks, and they are to their chins, so they are with heads [kept] aloft.

ayahArabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِىٓ أَعْنٰقِهِمْ أَغْلٰلًا فَهِىَ إِلَى ٱلْأَذْقَانِ فَهُم مُّقْمَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have put shackles on their necks, and they are to their chins, so they are with heads [kept] aloft.

targetTranslation: those who are forcibly made to lift their heads (referring to the disbelievers mentioned in أَعْنٰقِهِمْ)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِىٓ أَعْنٰقِهِمْ أَغْلٰلًا فَهِىَ إِلَى ٱلْأَذْقَانِ فَهُم مُّقْمَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, We have put shackles on their necks, and they are to their chins, so they are with heads [kept] aloft.

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا مِنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ سَدًّا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَأَغْشَيْنٰهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have put before them a barrier and behind them a barrier and covered them, so they do not see.

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا مِنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ سَدًّا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَأَغْشَيْنٰهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have put before them a barrier and behind them a barrier and covered them, so they do not see.

targetTranslation: a strong barrier (object of جَعَلْنَا - we made/placed)

ayahEnglish: And We have put before them a barrier and behind them a barrier and covered them, so they do not see.

targetTranslation: behind them (after سَدًّا/barrier in this ayah)

ayahEnglish: And We have put before them a barrier and behind them a barrier and covered them, so they do not see.

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا مِنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ سَدًّا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَأَغْشَيْنٰهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have put before them a barrier and behind them a barrier and covered them, so they do not see.

targetTranslation: they see (subject of لَا - 'they do not see')
ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا مِنۢ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيهِمْ سَدًّا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَأَغْشَيْنٰهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have put before them a barrier and behind them a barrier and covered them, so they do not see.

ayahArabic: وَسَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is all the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them - they will not believe.

ayahArabic: وَسَوَآءٌ عَلَيْهِمْ ءَأَنذَرْتَهُمْ أَمْ لَمْ تُنذِرْهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: And it is all the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them - they will not believe.

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَخَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ فَبَشِّرْهُ بِمَغْفِرَةٍ وَأَجْرٍ كَرِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: You can only warn one who follows the message and fears the Most Merciful unseen. So give him good tidings of forgiveness and noble reward.

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَخَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ فَبَشِّرْهُ بِمَغْفِرَةٍ وَأَجْرٍ كَرِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: You can only warn one who follows the message and fears the Most Merciful unseen. So give him good tidings of forgiveness and noble reward.

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَخَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ فَبَشِّرْهُ بِمَغْفِرَةٍ وَأَجْرٍ كَرِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: You can only warn one who follows the message and fears the Most Merciful unseen. So give him good tidings of forgiveness and noble reward.

ayahArabic: إِنَّمَا تُنذِرُ مَنِ ٱتَّبَعَ ٱلذِّكْرَ وَخَشِىَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنَ بِٱلْغَيْبِ فَبَشِّرْهُ بِمَغْفِرَةٍ وَأَجْرٍ كَرِيمٍ
ayahEnglish: You can only warn one who follows the message and fears the Most Merciful unseen. So give him good tidings of forgiveness and noble reward.

targetTranslation: we (subject of نُحْىِ - we give life)
ayahArabic: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْىِ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ وَنَكْتُبُ مَا قَدَّمُوا۟ وَءَاثٰرَهُمْ وَكُلَّ شَىْءٍ أَحْصَيْنٰهُ فِىٓ إِمَامٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: Indeed, it is We who bring the dead to life and record what they have put forth and what they left behind, and all things We have enumerated in a clear register.

targetTranslation: we give life (verb in نَحْنُ نُحْىِ ٱلْمَوْتَىٰ - we give life to the dead)

ayahEnglish: Indeed, it is We who bring the dead to life and record what they have put forth and what they left behind, and all things We have enumerated in a clear register.

targetTranslation: a clear example (object of وَٱضْرِبْ - strike/coin)

ayahEnglish: And present to them an example: the people of the city, when the messengers came to it -

ayahEnglish: And present to them an example: the people of the city, when the messengers came to it -

ayahArabic: إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهِمُ ٱثْنَيْنِ فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَعَزَّزْنَا بِثَالِثٍ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ إِلَيْكُم مُّرْسَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: When We sent to them two but they denied them, so We strengthened [them] with a third, and they said, "Indeed, we are messengers to you."

ayahArabic: إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهِمُ ٱثْنَيْنِ فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَعَزَّزْنَا بِثَالِثٍ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ إِلَيْكُم مُّرْسَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: When We sent to them two but they denied them, so We strengthened [them] with a third, and they said, "Indeed, we are messengers to you."

ayahArabic: إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهِمُ ٱثْنَيْنِ فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَعَزَّزْنَا بِثَالِثٍ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ إِلَيْكُم مُّرْسَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: When We sent to them two but they denied them, so We strengthened [them] with a third, and they said, "Indeed, we are messengers to you."

ayahArabic: إِذْ أَرْسَلْنَآ إِلَيْهِمُ ٱثْنَيْنِ فَكَذَّبُوهُمَا فَعَزَّزْنَا بِثَالِثٍ فَقَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّآ إِلَيْكُم مُّرْسَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: When We sent to them two but they denied them, so We strengthened [them] with a third, and they said, "Indeed, we are messengers to you."

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ مَآ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ مِن شَىْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا تَكْذِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: They said, "You are not but human beings like us, and the Most Merciful has not revealed a thing. You are only telling lies."

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ مَآ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَا وَمَآ أَنزَلَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ مِن شَىْءٍ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا تَكْذِبُونَ

ayahArabic: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وٰحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ خٰمِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: It was not but one shout, and immediately they were extinguished.

ayahArabic: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وٰحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ خٰمِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: It was not but one shout, and immediately they were extinguished.

ayahArabic: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وٰحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ خٰمِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: It was not but one shout, and immediately they were extinguished.

targetTranslation: ones who are still/silent (predicate of هُمْ)
ayahArabic: إِن كَانَتْ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وٰحِدَةً فَإِذَا هُمْ خٰمِدُونَ
ayahEnglish: It was not but one shout, and immediately they were extinguished.

targetTranslation: he comes/arrives to them (object of يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ)
ayahArabic: يٰحَسْرَةً عَلَى ٱلْعِبَادِ مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: How regretful for the servants. There did not come to them any messenger except that they used to ridicule him.

targetTranslation: any messenger (being referred to in مِن رَّسُولٍ - 'of any messenger')
ayahArabic: يٰحَسْرَةً عَلَى ٱلْعِبَادِ مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: How regretful for the servants. There did not come to them any messenger except that they used to ridicule him.

ayahArabic: يٰحَسْرَةً عَلَى ٱلْعِبَادِ مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: How regretful for the servants. There did not come to them any messenger except that they used to ridicule him.

ayahArabic: يٰحَسْرَةً عَلَى ٱلْعِبَادِ مَا يَأْتِيهِم مِّن رَّسُولٍ إِلَّا كَانُوا۟ بِهِۦ يَسْتَهْزِءُونَ
ayahEnglish: How regretful for the servants. There did not come to them any messenger except that they used to ridicule him.

ayahArabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not considered how many generations We destroyed before them - that they to them will not return?

targetTranslation: they see (in أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ - 'Did they not see?')
ayahArabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not considered how many generations We destroyed before them - that they to them will not return?

targetTranslation: how many (of the generations mentioned in أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ)
ayahArabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not considered how many generations We destroyed before them - that they to them will not return?

targetTranslation: we destroyed (object of يَرَوْا - they saw)
ayahArabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not considered how many generations We destroyed before them - that they to them will not return?

targetTranslation: before them (referring to previous generations mentioned in مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ)
ayahArabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not considered how many generations We destroyed before them - that they to them will not return?

targetTranslation: they return (subject of لَا in this ayah)
ayahArabic: أَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ كَمْ أَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُم مِّنَ ٱلْقُرُونِ أَنَّهُمْ إِلَيْهِمْ لَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: Have they not considered how many generations We destroyed before them - that they to them will not return?

ayahArabic: وَإِن كُلٌّ لَّمَّا جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, all of them will yet be brought present before Us.

ayahArabic: وَإِن كُلٌّ لَّمَّا جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, all of them will yet be brought present before Us.

targetTranslation: surely with us (related to مُحْضَرُونَ - they are brought)
ayahArabic: وَإِن كُلٌّ لَّمَّا جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, all of them will yet be brought present before Us.

ayahArabic: وَإِن كُلٌّ لَّمَّا جَمِيعٌ لَّدَيْنَا مُحْضَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And indeed, all of them will yet be brought present before Us.

targetTranslation: we gave life to it (referring to الْأَرْضُ - the earth)
ayahArabic: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَرْضُ ٱلْمَيْتَةُ أَحْيَيْنٰهَا وَأَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّا فَمِنْهُ يَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And a sign for them is the dead earth. We have brought it to life and brought forth from it grain, and from it they eat.

targetTranslation: grain/seed (object of أَخْرَجْنَا - we brought forth)
ayahArabic: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَرْضُ ٱلْمَيْتَةُ أَحْيَيْنٰهَا وَأَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّا فَمِنْهُ يَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And a sign for them is the dead earth. We have brought it to life and brought forth from it grain, and from it they eat.

targetTranslation: they eat (from the grain mentioned in أَحْيَيْنٰهَا وَأَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّا)
ayahArabic: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلْأَرْضُ ٱلْمَيْتَةُ أَحْيَيْنٰهَا وَأَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّا فَمِنْهُ يَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And a sign for them is the dead earth. We have brought it to life and brought forth from it grain, and from it they eat.

targetTranslation: gardens (being described by مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنٰبٍ - of palms and grapes)
ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا جَنَّاتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنٰبٍ وَفَجَّرْنَا فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْعُيُونِ
ayahEnglish: And We placed therein gardens of palm trees and grapevines and caused to burst forth therefrom some springs -

ayahArabic: وَجَعَلْنَا فِيهَا جَنَّاتٍ مِّن نَّخِيلٍ وَأَعْنٰبٍ وَفَجَّرْنَا فِيهَا مِنَ ٱلْعُيُونِ
ayahEnglish: And We placed therein gardens of palm trees and grapevines and caused to burst forth therefrom some springs -

ayahArabic: لِيَأْكُلُوا۟ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتْهُ أَيْدِيهِمْ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: That they may eat of His fruit. And their hands have not produced it, so will they not be grateful?

targetTranslation: she made/produced it (referring to what أَيْدِيهِمْ/their hands created)
ayahArabic: لِيَأْكُلُوا۟ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتْهُ أَيْدِيهِمْ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: That they may eat of His fruit. And their hands have not produced it, so will they not be grateful?

ayahArabic: لِيَأْكُلُوا۟ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتْهُ أَيْدِيهِمْ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: That they may eat of His fruit. And their hands have not produced it, so will they not be grateful?

targetTranslation: so will they not? (expecting them to يَشْكُرُونَ - be grateful)
ayahArabic: لِيَأْكُلُوا۟ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتْهُ أَيْدِيهِمْ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: That they may eat of His fruit. And their hands have not produced it, so will they not be grateful?

targetTranslation: they show gratitude (referring to those who benefit from Allah's provisions mentioned in the previous ayah)
ayahArabic: لِيَأْكُلُوا۟ مِن ثَمَرِهِۦ وَمَا عَمِلَتْهُ أَيْدِيهِمْ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: That they may eat of His fruit. And their hands have not produced it, so will they not be grateful?

ayahArabic: سُبْحٰنَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Exalted is He who created all pairs - from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know.

targetTranslation: the one who, which, that (describes سُبْحٰنَ)
ayahArabic: سُبْحٰنَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Exalted is He who created all pairs - from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know.

ayahArabic: سُبْحٰنَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Exalted is He who created all pairs - from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know.

ayahArabic: سُبْحٰنَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Exalted is He who created all pairs - from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know.

ayahArabic: سُبْحٰنَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Exalted is He who created all pairs - from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know.

targetTranslation: their selves (possessed by them in مِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ - from their selves)
ayahArabic: سُبْحٰنَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Exalted is He who created all pairs - from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know.

ayahArabic: سُبْحٰنَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلْأَزْوٰجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنۢبِتُ ٱلْأَرْضُ وَمِنْ أَنفُسِهِمْ وَمِمَّا لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahEnglish: Exalted is He who created all pairs - from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know.

targetTranslation: we strip/peel off (the daylight from the night)
ayahArabic: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلَّيْلُ نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فَإِذَا هُم مُّظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And a sign for them is the night. We remove from it the [light of] day, so they are [left] in darkness.

ayahArabic: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلَّيْلُ نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فَإِذَا هُم مُّظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And a sign for them is the night. We remove from it the [light of] day, so they are [left] in darkness.

targetTranslation: ones who are in deep darkness
ayahArabic: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمُ ٱلَّيْلُ نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ ٱلنَّهَارَ فَإِذَا هُم مُّظْلِمُونَ
ayahEnglish: And a sign for them is the night. We remove from it the [light of] day, so they are [left] in darkness.

ayahArabic: وَٱلشَّمْسُ تَجْرِى لِمُسْتَقَرٍّ لَّهَا ذٰلِكَ تَقْدِيرُ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْعَلِيمِ
ayahEnglish: And the sun runs [on course] toward its stopping point. That is the determination of the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.

ayahArabic: وَٱلشَّمْسُ تَجْرِى لِمُسْتَقَرٍّ لَّهَا ذٰلِكَ تَقْدِيرُ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْعَلِيمِ
ayahEnglish: And the sun runs [on course] toward its stopping point. That is the determination of the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.

ayahArabic: وَٱلشَّمْسُ تَجْرِى لِمُسْتَقَرٍّ لَّهَا ذٰلِكَ تَقْدِيرُ ٱلْعَزِيزِ ٱلْعَلِيمِ
ayahEnglish: And the sun runs [on course] toward its stopping point. That is the determination of the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.

targetTranslation: we measured it precisely (referring to القمر/the moon)
ayahArabic: وَٱلْقَمَرَ قَدَّرْنٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلْعُرْجُونِ ٱلْقَدِيمِ
ayahEnglish: And the moon - We have determined for it phases, until it returns [appearing] like the old date stalk.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْقَمَرَ قَدَّرْنٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلْعُرْجُونِ ٱلْقَدِيمِ
ayahEnglish: And the moon - We have determined for it phases, until it returns [appearing] like the old date stalk.

ayahArabic: وَٱلْقَمَرَ قَدَّرْنٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتَّىٰ عَادَ كَٱلْعُرْجُونِ ٱلْقَدِيمِ
ayahEnglish: And the moon - We have determined for it phases, until it returns [appearing] like the old date stalk.

ayahArabic: لَا ٱلشَّمْسُ يَنۢبَغِى لَهَآ أَن تُدْرِكَ ٱلْقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيْلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِ وَكُلٌّ فِى فَلَكٍ يَسْبَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is not allowable [i.e., possible] for the sun to reach the moon, nor does the night overtake the day, but each, in an orbit, is swimming.

ayahArabic: لَا ٱلشَّمْسُ يَنۢبَغِى لَهَآ أَن تُدْرِكَ ٱلْقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيْلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِ وَكُلٌّ فِى فَلَكٍ يَسْبَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is not allowable [i.e., possible] for the sun to reach the moon, nor does the night overtake the day, but each, in an orbit, is swimming.

targetTranslation: one who races ahead (describing الليل/the night)
ayahArabic: لَا ٱلشَّمْسُ يَنۢبَغِى لَهَآ أَن تُدْرِكَ ٱلْقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيْلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِ وَكُلٌّ فِى فَلَكٍ يَسْبَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is not allowable [i.e., possible] for the sun to reach the moon, nor does the night overtake the day, but each, in an orbit, is swimming.

targetTranslation: in an orbit (referring to where celestial bodies move)
ayahArabic: لَا ٱلشَّمْسُ يَنۢبَغِى لَهَآ أَن تُدْرِكَ ٱلْقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيْلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِ وَكُلٌّ فِى فَلَكٍ يَسْبَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is not allowable [i.e., possible] for the sun to reach the moon, nor does the night overtake the day, but each, in an orbit, is swimming.

targetTranslation: they glide (through space) (referring to celestial bodies in their orbits)
ayahArabic: لَا ٱلشَّمْسُ يَنۢبَغِى لَهَآ أَن تُدْرِكَ ٱلْقَمَرَ وَلَا ٱلَّيْلُ سَابِقُ ٱلنَّهَارِ وَكُلٌّ فِى فَلَكٍ يَسْبَحُونَ
ayahEnglish: It is not allowable [i.e., possible] for the sun to reach the moon, nor does the night overtake the day, but each, in an orbit, is swimming.

ayahArabic: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمْ أَنَّا حَمَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
ayahEnglish: And a sign for them is that We carried their forefathers in a laden ship.

ayahArabic: وَءَايَةٌ لَّهُمْ أَنَّا حَمَلْنَا ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ فِى ٱلْفُلْكِ ٱلْمَشْحُونِ
ayahEnglish: And a sign for them is that We carried their forefathers in a laden ship.

ayahArabic: وَخَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ مَا يَرْكَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We created for them from the likes of it that which they ride.

ayahArabic: وَخَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ مَا يَرْكَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We created for them from the likes of it that which they ride.

ayahArabic: وَخَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّن مِّثْلِهِۦ مَا يَرْكَبُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We created for them from the likes of it that which they ride.

ayahArabic: وَإِن نَّشَأْ نُغْرِقْهُمْ فَلَا صَرِيخَ لَهُمْ وَلَا هُمْ يُنقَذُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if We should will, We could drown them; then no one responding to a cry would there be for them, nor would they be saved

ayahArabic: وَإِذَا قِيلَ لَهُمْ أَنفِقُوا۟ مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ ٱللَّهُ قَالَ ٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ أَنُطْعِمُ مَن لَّوْ يَشَآءُ ٱللَّهُ أَطْعَمَهُۥٓ إِنْ أَنتُمْ إِلَّا فِى ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahEnglish: And when it is said to them, "Spend from that which Allāh has provided for you," those who disbelieve say to those who believe, "Should we feed one whom, if Allāh had willed, He would have fed? You are not but in clear error."

ayahArabic: مَا يَنظُرُونَ إِلَّا صَيْحَةً وٰحِدَةً تَأْخُذُهُمْ وَهُمْ يَخِصِّمُونَ
ayahEnglish: They do not await except one blast which will seize them while they are disputing.

targetTranslation: they are able (referring to the disbelievers in the ayah)

ayahEnglish: And they will not be able [to give] any instruction, nor to their people can they return.

ayahEnglish: And they will not be able [to give] any instruction, nor to their people can they return.

targetTranslation: they (referring to those rising from graves)
ayahArabic: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَإِذَا هُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَنسِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the Horn will be blown; and at once from the graves to their Lord they will hasten.

ayahArabic: وَنُفِخَ فِى ٱلصُّورِ فَإِذَا هُم مِّنَ ٱلْأَجْدَاثِ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِمْ يَنسِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And the Horn will be blown; and at once from the graves to their Lord they will hasten.

ayahEnglish: And the Horn will be blown; and at once from the graves to their Lord they will hasten.

ayahArabic: قَالُوا۟ يٰوَيْلَنَا مَنۢ بَعَثَنَا مِن مَّرْقَدِنَا هٰذَا مَا وَعَدَ ٱلرَّحْمٰنُ وَصَدَقَ ٱلْمُرْسَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: They will say, "O woe to us! Who has raised us up from our sleeping place?" [The reply will be], "This is what the Most Merciful had promised, and the messengers told the truth."

targetTranslation: who (asking about who woke them up from their sleep)

targetTranslation: she was (part of صَيْحَةً وٰحِدَةً - a single cry)

ayahEnglish: It will not be but one blast, and at once they are all brought present before Us.

ayahArabic: فَٱلْيَوْمَ لَا تُظْلَمُ نَفْسٌ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
ayahEnglish: So today [i.e., the Day of Judgement] no soul will be wronged at all, and you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do.

ayahArabic: فَٱلْيَوْمَ لَا تُظْلَمُ نَفْسٌ شَيْـًٔا وَلَا تُجْزَوْنَ إِلَّا مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ

ayahEnglish: Indeed the companions of Paradise, that Day, will be amused in [joyful] occupation -

ayahArabic: هُمْ وَأَزْوٰجُهُمْ فِى ظِلٰلٍ عَلَى ٱلْأَرَآئِكِ مُتَّكِـُٔونَ

ayahEnglish: [And] "Peace," a word from a Merciful Lord.

ayahEnglish: [Then He will say], "But stand apart today, you criminals.

ayahArabic: أَلَمْ أَعْهَدْ إِلَيْكُمْ يٰبَنِىٓ ءَادَمَ أَن لَّا تَعْبُدُوا۟ ٱلشَّيْطٰنَ إِنَّهُۥ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: Did I not enjoin upon you, O children of Adam, that you not worship Satan - [for] indeed, he is to you a clear enemy -

ayahArabic: هٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُمْ تُوعَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: This is the Hellfire which you were promised.

targetTranslation: the one which/that (feminine, referring to جَهَنَّمُ)
ayahArabic: هٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُمْ تُوعَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: This is the Hellfire which you were promised.

targetTranslation: you all were (being warned about in تُوعَدُونَ)
ayahArabic: هٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُمْ تُوعَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: This is the Hellfire which you were promised.

ayahArabic: هٰذِهِۦ جَهَنَّمُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُمْ تُوعَدُونَ
ayahEnglish: This is the Hellfire which you were promised.

ayahArabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْفُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Enter to] burn therein today for what you used to deny."

targetTranslation: you all were (addressing the disbelievers in تَكْفُرُونَ)
ayahArabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْفُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Enter to] burn therein today for what you used to deny."

targetTranslation: you all reject/deny (referring to the disbelievers being addressed)
ayahArabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا ٱلْيَوْمَ بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَكْفُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: [Enter to] burn therein today for what you used to deny."

targetTranslation: we seal (referring to what Allah will do on that Day)
ayahArabic: ٱلْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفْوٰهِهِمْ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَتَشْهَدُ أَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: That Day, We will seal over their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will testify about what they used to earn.

ayahArabic: ٱلْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفْوٰهِهِمْ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَتَشْهَدُ أَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: That Day, We will seal over their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will testify about what they used to earn.

targetTranslation: their hands (speaking about the disbelievers whose mouths are sealed)
ayahArabic: ٱلْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفْوٰهِهِمْ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَتَشْهَدُ أَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: That Day, We will seal over their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will testify about what they used to earn.

ayahArabic: ٱلْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفْوٰهِهِمْ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَتَشْهَدُ أَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: That Day, We will seal over their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will testify about what they used to earn.

ayahArabic: ٱلْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفْوٰهِهِمْ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَتَشْهَدُ أَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: That Day, We will seal over their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will testify about what they used to earn.

targetTranslation: they earn/gain (referring to what they used to do)
ayahArabic: ٱلْيَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلَىٰٓ أَفْوٰهِهِمْ وَتُكَلِّمُنَآ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَتَشْهَدُ أَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا۟ يَكْسِبُونَ
ayahEnglish: That Day, We will seal over their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will testify about what they used to earn.

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَىٰٓ أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَٱسْتَبَقُوا۟ ٱلصِّرٰطَ فَأَنَّىٰ يُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if We willed, We could have obliterated their eyes, and they would race to [find] the path, and how could they see?

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَىٰٓ أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَٱسْتَبَقُوا۟ ٱلصِّرٰطَ فَأَنَّىٰ يُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if We willed, We could have obliterated their eyes, and they would race to [find] the path, and how could they see?

targetTranslation: they see/perceive (referring to the disbelievers in this ayah)
ayahArabic: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَىٰٓ أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَٱسْتَبَقُوا۟ ٱلصِّرٰطَ فَأَنَّىٰ يُبْصِرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if We willed, We could have obliterated their eyes, and they would race to [find] the path, and how could they see?

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخْنٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا ٱسْتَطٰعُوا۟ مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if We willed, We could have deformed them, [paralyzing them] in their places so they would not be able to proceed, nor could they return.

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخْنٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا ٱسْتَطٰعُوا۟ مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if We willed, We could have deformed them, [paralyzing them] in their places so they would not be able to proceed, nor could they return.

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخْنٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا ٱسْتَطٰعُوا۟ مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if We willed, We could have deformed them, [paralyzing them] in their places so they would not be able to proceed, nor could they return.

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخْنٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا ٱسْتَطٰعُوا۟ مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if We willed, We could have deformed them, [paralyzing them] in their places so they would not be able to proceed, nor could they return.

ayahArabic: وَلَوْ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخْنٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا ٱسْتَطٰعُوا۟ مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ
ayahEnglish: And if We willed, We could have deformed them, [paralyzing them] in their places so they would not be able to proceed, nor could they return.

ayahArabic: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نُنَكِّسْهُ فِى ٱلْخَلْقِ أَفَلَا يَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And he to whom We grant long life We reverse in creation; so will they not understand?

targetTranslation: we turn him completely upside down (connected to نُّعَمِّرْهُ - we give him long life)
ayahArabic: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نُنَكِّسْهُ فِى ٱلْخَلْقِ أَفَلَا يَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And he to whom We grant long life We reverse in creation; so will they not understand?

targetTranslation: then will they not? (subject of يَعْقِلُونَ)
ayahArabic: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نُنَكِّسْهُ فِى ٱلْخَلْقِ أَفَلَا يَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And he to whom We grant long life We reverse in creation; so will they not understand?

targetTranslation: they use their minds (أَفَلَا - so do they not)
ayahArabic: وَمَن نُّعَمِّرْهُ نُنَكِّسْهُ فِى ٱلْخَلْقِ أَفَلَا يَعْقِلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And he to whom We grant long life We reverse in creation; so will they not understand?

ayahArabic: وَمَا عَلَّمْنٰهُ ٱلشِّعْرَ وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لَهُۥٓ إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ وَقُرْءَانٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And We did not give him [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)] knowledge of poetry, nor is it befitting for him. It is not but a message and a clear Qur’ān

ayahArabic: وَمَا عَلَّمْنٰهُ ٱلشِّعْرَ وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لَهُۥٓ إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ وَقُرْءَانٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And We did not give him [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)] knowledge of poetry, nor is it befitting for him. It is not but a message and a clear Qur’ān

ayahArabic: وَمَا عَلَّمْنٰهُ ٱلشِّعْرَ وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لَهُۥٓ إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ وَقُرْءَانٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And We did not give him [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)] knowledge of poetry, nor is it befitting for him. It is not but a message and a clear Qur’ān

targetTranslation: a reminder (connected to قُرْءَانٌ مُّبِينٌ - clear Quran)
ayahArabic: وَمَا عَلَّمْنٰهُ ٱلشِّعْرَ وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لَهُۥٓ إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ وَقُرْءَانٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And We did not give him [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)] knowledge of poetry, nor is it befitting for him. It is not but a message and a clear Qur’ān

targetTranslation: a very clear explanation (of the Quran)
ayahArabic: وَمَا عَلَّمْنٰهُ ٱلشِّعْرَ وَمَا يَنۢبَغِى لَهُۥٓ إِنْ هُوَ إِلَّا ذِكْرٌ وَقُرْءَانٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahEnglish: And We did not give him [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)] knowledge of poetry, nor is it befitting for him. It is not but a message and a clear Qur’ān

ayahArabic: لِّيُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيًّا وَيَحِقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَى ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: To warn whoever is alive and justify the word [i.e., decree] against the disbelievers.

targetTranslation: he was/existed (describing who حَيًّا 'alive' refers to)
ayahArabic: لِّيُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيًّا وَيَحِقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَى ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: To warn whoever is alive and justify the word [i.e., decree] against the disbelievers.

ayahArabic: لِّيُنذِرَ مَن كَانَ حَيًّا وَيَحِقَّ ٱلْقَوْلُ عَلَى ٱلْكٰفِرِينَ
ayahEnglish: To warn whoever is alive and justify the word [i.e., decree] against the disbelievers.

ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَآ أَنْعٰمًا فَهُمْ لَهَا مٰلِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they not see that We have created for them from what Our hands have made, grazing livestock, and [then] they are their owners?

targetTranslation: they see (أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا - that We created)
ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَآ أَنْعٰمًا فَهُمْ لَهَا مٰلِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they not see that We have created for them from what Our hands have made, grazing livestock, and [then] they are their owners?

ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَآ أَنْعٰمًا فَهُمْ لَهَا مٰلِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they not see that We have created for them from what Our hands have made, grazing livestock, and [then] they are their owners?

ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَآ أَنْعٰمًا فَهُمْ لَهَا مٰلِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they not see that We have created for them from what Our hands have made, grazing livestock, and [then] they are their owners?

ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَآ أَنْعٰمًا فَهُمْ لَهَا مٰلِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they not see that We have created for them from what Our hands have made, grazing livestock, and [then] they are their owners?

ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَآ أَنْعٰمًا فَهُمْ لَهَا مٰلِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they not see that We have created for them from what Our hands have made, grazing livestock, and [then] they are their owners?

ayahArabic: أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ أَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُم مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ أَيْدِينَآ أَنْعٰمًا فَهُمْ لَهَا مٰلِكُونَ
ayahEnglish: Do they not see that We have created for them from what Our hands have made, grazing livestock, and [then] they are their owners?

ayahArabic: وَذَلَّلْنٰهَا لَهُمْ فَمِنْهَا رَكُوبُهُمْ وَمِنْهَا يَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have tamed them for them, so some of them they ride, and some of them they eat.

ayahArabic: وَذَلَّلْنٰهَا لَهُمْ فَمِنْهَا رَكُوبُهُمْ وَمِنْهَا يَأْكُلُونَ
ayahEnglish: And We have tamed them for them, so some of them they ride, and some of them they eat.

ayahArabic: وَلَهُمْ فِيهَا مَنٰفِعُ وَمَشَارِبُ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for them therein are [other] benefits and drinks, so will they not be grateful?

targetTranslation: so will they not? (asking about يَشْكُرُونَ - their gratitude)
ayahArabic: وَلَهُمْ فِيهَا مَنٰفِعُ وَمَشَارِبُ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for them therein are [other] benefits and drinks, so will they not be grateful?

ayahArabic: وَلَهُمْ فِيهَا مَنٰفِعُ وَمَشَارِبُ أَفَلَا يَشْكُرُونَ
ayahEnglish: And for them therein are [other] benefits and drinks, so will they not be grateful?

ayahArabic: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةً لَّعَلَّهُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: But they have taken besides Allāh [false] deities that perhaps they would be helped.

ayahArabic: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةً لَّعَلَّهُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: But they have taken besides Allāh [false] deities that perhaps they would be helped.

targetTranslation: gods (as the object of وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ - they took)
ayahArabic: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةً لَّعَلَّهُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: But they have taken besides Allāh [false] deities that perhaps they would be helped.

ayahArabic: وَٱتَّخَذُوا۟ مِن دُونِ ٱللَّهِ ءَالِهَةً لَّعَلَّهُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: But they have taken besides Allāh [false] deities that perhaps they would be helped.

ayahArabic: لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَهُمْ جُندٌ مُّحْضَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They are not able to help them, and they [themselves] are for them soldiers in attendance.

targetTranslation: their help/victory (object of يَسْتَطِيعُونَ - they are able)
ayahArabic: لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَهُمْ جُندٌ مُّحْضَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They are not able to help them, and they [themselves] are for them soldiers in attendance.

ayahArabic: لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَهُمْ جُندٌ مُّحْضَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They are not able to help them, and they [themselves] are for them soldiers in attendance.

targetTranslation: those who are brought (plural passive participle)
ayahArabic: لَا يَسْتَطِيعُونَ نَصْرَهُمْ وَهُمْ لَهُمْ جُندٌ مُّحْضَرُونَ
ayahEnglish: They are not able to help them, and they [themselves] are for them soldiers in attendance.

targetTranslation: he makes you sad (object of قَوْلُهُمْ - their saying)
ayahArabic: فَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ إِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: So let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, We know what they conceal and what they declare.

ayahArabic: فَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ إِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: So let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, We know what they conceal and what they declare.

ayahArabic: فَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ إِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: So let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, We know what they conceal and what they declare.

targetTranslation: that which (object of يُسِرُّونَ and يُعْلِنُونَ)
ayahArabic: فَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ إِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: So let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, We know what they conceal and what they declare.

ayahArabic: فَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ إِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا يُسِرُّونَ وَمَا يُعْلِنُونَ
ayahEnglish: So let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, We know what they conceal and what they declare.

targetTranslation: they make public (what they say, in contrast to يُسِرُّونَ - what they hide)

ayahEnglish: So let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, We know what they conceal and what they declare.

targetTranslation: and has he not... ? (questioning the subject يَرَ)

ayahEnglish: Does man not consider that We created him from a [mere] sperm-drop - then at once he is a clear adversary?

targetTranslation: And is it not? (connected to what follows about Allah's power to create)
ayahArabic: أَوَلَيْسَ ٱلَّذِى خَلَقَ ٱلسَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ بِقٰدِرٍ عَلَىٰٓ أَن يَخْلُقَ مِثْلَهُم بَلَىٰ وَهُوَ ٱلْخَلَّاقُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahEnglish: Is not He who created the heavens and the earth Able to create the likes of them? Yes, [it is so]; and He is the Knowing Creator.

ayahEnglish: His command is only when He intends a thing that He says to it, "Be," and it is.
